rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §29.3585, which governs comptroller suspension and removal of education service providers and vendors. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The comptroller shall immediately suspend a preapproved education service provider or vendor of educational products on finding that the provider or vendor:
_note: No conflict identified; the rule text addresses education program vendor suspension, not property tax homestead exemptions.
